text:
Applicants eligible for the “ **Bocconi Sport Scholarships**” for A.Y. 2026–27 include **students:**
- Italian or international applicants enrolled in the first year to a bachelor's degree program, master’s degree program, master's degree program in law, or university master’s degree program in the a.y. 2026-2027 and selected and registered with the main Bocconi Sport teams (Bocconi Sport Athletes Scholarships);
or
- Italian or international applicants enrolled in the first year to a bachelor's degree program, master's degree program, master's degree program in law, HEC-Bocconi Double Degree Program or university master’s degree program in the a.y. 2026-2027 who are involved in high-profile sports activities of national and international interest and are **members of national or foreign sports clubs or associations** (Bocconi Sport Talent Scholarships);

- **Priority will be given to****:**
Students with an **ISEE below €30,000** and a consistent financial situation based on Bocconi's family assessment method. However, students with higher ISEE values will also be considered.

Furthermore, it is specified that all students must submit the **application**: Bocconi4Access to Education a.y. 2026-2027 ( **please see below points 3 and 4**)

**Attention**:

The Fees, Funding and Housing Office will verify all documents presented and will assess the economic and asset condition of the Bocconi conventional family household of the student:
- [_**Economic and Asset Situation for Bachelor and Law**_](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/funding/economic-and-asset-situation-ay-2026-2027)
- [_**Economic and Asset Situation for Master of Science**_](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/funding/economic-and-asset-situation-ay-2026-2027)
- [_**Bocconi Conventional Family Household for Bachelor and Law**_](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/funding/bocconi-conventional-family-household-ay-2026-2027)
- [_**Bocconi Conventional Family Household for Master of Science**_](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/funding/bocconi-conventional-family-household-ay-2026-2027)
Based on this evaluation, the office will determine the entity of the support that can be attributed. In fact, it is not assigned any benefit upon a single requisite or element of evaluation.

The selection of profiles eligible from a sporting point of view will be carried out by a special **Sports Subcommittee**.

##### **2\. General rules**

The provisions outlined on the following pages constitute official publication of the regulations for the benefits provided under the “ **Bocconi4Access to Education**” support scheme, dedicated to students enrolled in the a.y. 2026-27:
- [_**Bachelor and Law**_](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/funding/general-rules-ay-2026-2027)
- [_**Master of Science**_](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/master-science-and-ma-programs/funding/general-rules-master-science-programs)

metadata.title: BOCCONI SPORT SCHOLARSHIPS 2026/2027 | Bocconi Sport
metadata.heading_path: BOCCONI SPORT SCHOLARSHIPS 2026/2027 | Bocconi Sport

text:
##### **3\. Single Application: Deadlines and Submission Procedures**

Interested students have to submit the single “ **Bocconi4access to Education A.Y. 2026–27**” application, according to the _**deadlines and procedure foreseen:**_
- [_**Bachelor and Law**_](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/funding/bocconi-sport-scholarship-ay-2026-27)
- [_**Master of Science**_](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/master-science-and-ma-programs/funding/bocconi-sport-scholarship-ay-2026-27-master-science-programs)
Students enrolled in a University Master’s program who are interested in submitting an application are invited to write to [**funding@unibocconi.it**](mailto:funding@unibocconi.it) _._

##### **4\. Required documentation**

The benefit can only be assigned after the detailed examination of all the required documentation submitted by the applicant in the “ **Bocconi4Access to Education A.Y. 2026–27**” application, as detailed:
- [_**Bachelor and Law**_](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/funding/required-documentation-funding-application-ay-2026-27)
- [_**Master of Science**_](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/master-science-and-ma-programs/funding/required-documentation-master-science-programs)
Please note that students applying for this type of benefit must also upload a **sports resume and/or presentation highlights** to their application.

Please be aware that **submitting an application does not automatically entitle** the student to receive the benefit, but is merely a condition for accessing the application assessment process.

##### **5\. Renewal**

All benefits assigned by Bocconi University as part of the “Bocconi4Access to Education” support scheme can be renewed year by year for the entire legal duration of the regular course of study, **if the merit requirements are met**, as specified:
- [_**Bachelor and Law**_](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/funding/renewal-ay-2026-2027)
- [_**Master of Science**_](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/master-science-and-ma-programs/funding/renewal-master-science)
Furthermore, sporting merit must be confirmed by the Sports Subcommittee.

Preferential rate housing renewal for the academic year 2027-28 is also subject to the above requirements being met.

Assigned students will be required to pay the first installment-advance each academic year. This amount, upon fulfillment of the benefit maintenance requirements, will be reimbursed each year by the end of December of the reference academic year.

##### **6\. Revocation and forfeiture**

Students may lose their benefit, or the benefit itself may be revoked, if one of the following conditions listed on the followingpages occurs:
- [_**Bachelor and Law**_](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/funding/revocation-and-forfeiture-ay-2026-27)
- [_**Master of Science**_](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/master-science-and-ma-programs/funding/revocation-and-forfeiture-master-science-programs)
[More…](https://www.bocconisport.eu/en/news/bocconi-sport-scholarships-20262027#addtoany "Show all")

text:
undefined

Ultimo aggiornamento: 26 February 2026

4 minuti di lettura

As part of the “Bocconi4Access to Education” program, the “ **Bocconi Sport Scholarships**” aim to support talented student-athletes by removing, where necessary, any socio-economic barriers that could prevent them from accessing university education.

This initiative stems from the University's belief that supporting high-level young athletes who are eager to commit their professional growth creates value for the community and for the country as a whole.

With the “ **Bocconi Sport Scholarships**”, the University grants a limited number of students (maximum 10 beneficiaries per year) exemption from university fees and contributions (between 60% and 100% depending on their verified financial situation) and the allocation of accommodation at a preferential rate of 50% of the full price.

Students who do not qualify for this support due to resource availability will be considered for one of the other benefits provided.

The "Bocconi4Access to Education" support scheme is highly detailed; the University will consider each application submitted for all benefits starting with the largest one up until all available resources are exhausted. The University will try and assign the one benefit that is most corresponding to the economic and asset situation assessed on the basis of the documentation submitted.

##### **1\. Eligible Applicants**

text:
undefined


Ultimo aggiornamento: 11 September 2025

2 minuti di lettura


#### Requirements for a valid medical certificate to participate in Bocconi Sport activities.

To register for Bocconi Sport, your medical certificate must fall into one of the following **two categories**:

1. Medical certificate for **non competitive** sports activities with a valid **ECG**
   - issued by a **Sports Medicine Center**, a **Specialist in Sports Medicine** or your **general practitioner/family doctor**

     **IN**:

     If issued by your general practitioner/family doctor, you must also provide a **signed self-declaration** (download template [**HERE**](https://www.bocconisport.eu/sites/default/files/2022-09/Dichiarazione%20Integrativa%20Cert.%20Medico%20di%20Famiglia.pdf)), confirming under your own responsibility that the doctor who issued the certificate is indeed your general practitioner/family doctor. Without this declaration, the certificate will **NOT** be accepted.

     Uploading the ECG tracing separately from the medical certificate is **NOT** valid. The term “ECG” must be explicitly stated on the certificate, as shown in the attached sample.

     Certificates for **recreational or motor activity** are **NOT** valid and will not be accepted.

     Certificates obtained by **Virgin Active CANNOT** **be accepted** for Bocconi Sport activities.

   - issued by an Italian doctor and written in Italian redatto da un medico italiano e in lingua italiana

     [**HERE**](https://www.bocconisport.eu/sites/default/files/2025-08/facsimilecertnonagon.pdf?VersionId=qieD07rI9naOre.y_5xQlxEL4WprwGLa) the example with all required elements highlighted in red.

     **SUBMISSION PROCEDURE**:

     The medical certificate must include the statement _“_ **copia conforme all’originale in mio possesso** _”_ with the **date** and **signature** of the certificate holder.

     It must be uploaded via the **you@B app**, in the widget **Bocconi Sport > Medical Certificate**.
2. medical certificate for **competitive sports activities** issued by a **Sports Medicine Center** (if you already have one, make sure it is written in Italian and is still valid)

**SUBMISSION PROCEDURE**:

Upload the certificate **online** via the **you@B app**, in the widget **Bocconi Sport > Medical Certificate.**

If you do not have either of these certificates, from September you can book a medical visit for a **non-competitive sports medical certificate with ECG**.

**Booking procedure:**

1. First, subscribe to the [**Bocconi Sport membership**](https://www.bocconisport.eu/news/bocconi-sport-membership).
2. Then, in the **“Membership”** section of the **“Sport”** widget in the **you@B agenda**, you will find the _Take Care_ booking link.

Medical visits are held on the **second floor of the Bocconi Sport Center**, Viale Toscana 30.

For any questions or issues, please email us at [**bocconisporteam@unibocconi.it**](mailto:bocconisporteam@unibocconi.it).

[More…](https://www.bocconisport.eu/en/news/medical-certificate#addtoany "Show all")

## **Are you a talent on video games and do you want to grow your interest in a healthy and competitive way?**

Bocconi Sport offers you the opportunity to join our Esports team!

Currently, the active teams are in the following titles:

\- League of Legends;

\- EA FC;

\- Rocket League;

\- NBA 2K25;

\- Gran Turismo 7

For those who join the team and wear the Bocconi colors, there will be weekly reserved spaces for training on consoles and computers in the **Red Bull Gaming Zone**.

In addition, all members who have submitted a valid medical certificate will also be able to access the gym of the Bocconi Sport Center dedicated to the Bocconi Sport teams.

text:
## **Are you a rugby player who wants to keep playing during your university years?**

Through a partnership with the prestigious AS Rugby Milano club, Bocconi Sport offers all students passionate about the sport the opportunity to train at one of Milan's best-equipped rugby facilities (G.B. Curioni Sports Center) and to compete across a wide range of levels.

In fact, AS Rugby Milano can guarantee participation in its senior competitive teams at three different levels, depending on the athlete's skill:

- **Serie A** – National Championship
- **Serie C1** – Regional Championship
- **UISP** – Regional Championship

The offer ensures that participation in any of the partnered activities, includes the opportunity:

- to take part in all team activities and competitions for your category, under the guidance of ASR Milano's coaching and athletic training staff.
- to have full access to the sports center, Clubhouse, restaurant, gyms, and changing rooms, as well as healthcare and physiotherapy services, and cultural and sporting events, with the same rights as all registered AS Rugby Milano members.

Are you interested in joining our rugby activities? Email us at [**rugby@unibocconi.it**](mailto:rugby@unibocconi.it) for all the details!

text:
Applicants who have been admitted to the first year of one of the following programs for the academic year of reference (2025-2026):
- Bachelor of Science
- Master of Science
- Integrated Master of Arts
Students enrolled in one of the following programs:
- Bachelor of Science
- Master of Science
- Integrated Master of Arts
Students who have been admitted or already enrolled on postgraduate University Master programs (I and II level), SDA Bocconi School of Management post-experiences and specialized master programs and PhD programs.

#### **Categories of interest**

This category includes student-athletes who play **competitive sports** with teams that are part of the Bocconi Sport Team. The teams included in the “Bocconi Sport Athletes” program for the Academic Year 2025-2026 are:
- Fip men's basketball
- Fip women's basketball
- Fipav women's volleyball
- Fipav men's volleyball
- Fin men's waterpolo
- Fin swimming
The Technical Commission reserves the right to evaluate any reports of athletes and/or sports that should arrive during the sporting season, in full compliance with the criteria of transparency and objectivity.

#### **Support services available**

Athletes selected for the "Bocconi Sport Athletes" support program will be entitled to the following benefits:
- the chance for priority access to the Bocconi University Residence
- free use of the fitness area at the Team Sport Arena with dedicated trainers
- use of services at the “Bocconi Sport Center” (pool, gym, fitness) at special terms
- "Player Development" trainings
- Premium Line for technical sports equipment
- medical certificate for competitive sports
- dedicated conventions for diagnostic exams
- dedicated convention with nutritionist
- medical and/or physioterapic services
- study award and reimbursement of expenses for final athletes under the unquestionable supervision of the Technical Commission on the basis of the sporting and academic commitment demonstrated during the season
**1\. APPLICATIONS**

**Students and potential new students** (those who have taken the entrance test and are waiting for the outcome) of the competitive teams of Bocconi Sport Team, defined as suitable by the Technical Commission, will be eligible for the status of "Sport Athletes" after passing the selection test for entry into the team under the unquestionable supervision of the Technical Staff of each team.

To apply for the selection of the team you need to contact the teams by email as follows, sending your **sports CV** and any **videos/highlights** if available:
- Men’s basketball Fip ⇒ [basketball@unibocconi.it](mailto:basketball@unibocconi.it)
- Women’s basketball Fip ⇒ [basketball@unibocconi.it](mailto:basketball@unibocconi.it)
- Women’s volleyball Fipav ⇒ [volleyball@unibocconi.it](mailto:volleyball@unibocconi.it)
- Men’s volleyball Fipav ⇒ [volleyball@unibocconi.it](mailto:volleyball@unibocconi.it)
- Men’s waterpolo Fin ⇒ [watersports@unibocconi.it](mailto:watersports@unibocconi.it)
- Swimming Fin ⇒ [watersports@unibocconi.it](mailto:watersports@unibocconi.it)

text:
**2\. ALLOCATION CRITERIA**

Awards and facilities will be awarded in 2 half-yearly tranches, a first tranche by 31 January 2026 on the basis of sports performance and a second tranche by 30 September 2026 on the basis of the sporting and academic performance achieved.

With reference to academic performance, **minimum merit requirements** must be met. For the purpose of calculating merit, the credit points valid for the program for which the benefit is requested will be taken into consideration.

Minimum merit requirements:
- BSc and IMA programs - CPs at 10/09/2025
  - 1st year (BSc/IMA) retroactive confirmation (10/09/2026) - 44
  - 2nd year (BSc/IMA) - 49
  - 3rd year (BSc/IMA) - 95
  - 4th year (IMA) - 150
  - 5th year (IMA) - 220

- MSc programs - CPs at 10/09/2025
  - 1st year retroactive confirmation (10/09/2026) - 39
  - 2nd year - 50
With reference to candidates **academic performance** of the University Master programs (I and II level), SDA Bocconi School of Management post-experiences and specialized master programs and PhD programs, **minimum merit requirements** will be defined by the Technical Committee upon consultation with the program Directors.

text:
## Who we are

Founded in 2020 by international students, BSAMC aims at researching and analyzing topics related to the Asset Management Industry while spreading interest for this field among young people.

Our primary mission is to build a strong worldwide network of students and professionals in the finance industry, in order to help our members start a successful career.

Our motto includes all the key features of the organization. Globality, diversity and research are at the core of our daily operations. Our biggest strength is the variety of students’ backgrounds  and experiences that give to the association a more open-minded take.

What we do

​

The two central divisions periodically release detailed articles and reports about asset management sphere and the wider finance world.

​

Insights and ideas are evaluated with an extensive hands-on approach.

​

Topics may vary from stock markets and investing strategies to client profiling and portfolio allocation.

Contact

text:
## Bocconi Students Capital Markets is the first Bocconi association to conceive the word “Finance” in its broadest sense; it gives freedom to students who like to discuss and write about a wide range of finance topics, including investment banking, asset management, hedge funds and private equity. Don’t worry, there is room for you even if you only like options and derivative instruments. | | | | --- | --- | | ## BSCM x Kea Consultants
We’re incredibly proud and excited to announce that we are partnering with [Kea Consultants](https://www.keaconsultants.com/), the leading boutique search firm operating in the European alternative investment space.
With its renowned reputation and highly valuable relationships with some of the most important players in the private equity, credit, hedge fund and venture capital sectors, Kea provides tailor-made solutions for hiring and developing young professionals for the finance industry, and identifying exceptional individuals for roles in investment funds. | ![Picture](https://www.bscapitalmarkets.com/uploads/7/0/5/5/70553335/editor/kea.jpeg?1714133973) | | | | | --- | --- | | ## **What We Do** | BSCM members primarily publish articles about global financial markets. Our teams cover three main areas: Americas, EMEA and Asia. As for now, BSCM is strongly focused on investment banking: it does not only give an overview on the topic, but also trains members who wish to join _Canary Wharf_ by preparing M&A cases, mock interviews and meetings with investment bankers.
We also organize additional projects all year round and members usually engage in several assignments while performing normal association duties. | | | | | --- | --- | | ## Mission Statement | ​Our main strength is freedom. From a tech IPO in the Silicon Valley to a hostile takeover in Hong Kong, our members cover the most relevant transactions and global market trends. | | | | | --- | --- | | | ## **SOCIAL NETWORKS**
[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/bscapitalmarkets/)[Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/company/10468294?trk=tyah&trkInfo=clickedVertical%3Acompany%2CclickedEntityId%3A10468294%2Cidx%3A2-2-3%2CtarId%3A1455383783804%2Ctas%3Astudents%20capit)[Mail](mailto:as.bcm@unibocconi.it)
## **EMAIL ADDRESS**
as.bcm@unibocconi.it
## **ADDRESS**
Bocconi University, Milan, 20136 Piazza Sraffa 25 | [Menu](https://www.bscapitalmarkets.com/#)

## Who We Are


Bocconi Students Consulting Club is the oldest and largest graduate consulting club in Italy. We are among the major consulting clubs in Europe and one of the most active associations at Bocconi University. BSCC mission is to offer its associates activities and instruments to support them in landing their dream job in consulting or related industries.

### Bocconi Students Consulting Club

text:
## What We Offer


Our trainings are led by experienced BSCC associates and alumnis. Dive into the depths of consulting with practical tips, proven strategies, and real-world case studies that will not only prepare you for case interviews but also set you apart in the competitive world of consulting.

### Training Excellence


Networking at BSCC goes beyond the ordinary – it's your gateway to the consulting world. Each semester, we organize exclusive company visits with leading consulting firms.  Several times each year, BSCC alumni gather to offer you a real-world perspective, sharing their success stories and offering practical career guidance.

### Networking

text:
Become a member by taking one of these roles
- **Personal Project**
- **Partnership**
- **Event**
- **Content**
- **Marketing**
- **Mentee**
#### Deliverable

Complete and publish your project with us.

#### Mission

Turn your idea into a project and publish it on our channels.

#### Description

Have an ML idea? Already building something and want peer feedback? Need help publishing your work?
BSML
offers support across coding, storytelling, and publishing.

#### Approximate workflow
1. Propose your project at an event or in the members’ chat.
2. Collaborate with associates to reach objectives and create content.
3. Publish on BSML channels with full recognition.
#### Examples
- You have a trading strategy and want help automating it and
testing ML models.
- You can publish work from an internship but need guidance to
write it up.
- You’re stuck on a thesis bug and want code debugging and
methodology feedback.

#### Requirements
- Personal project idea
- Openness to collaborators
**Your role brings fresh ideas and projects. It is BSML’s backbone.**

#### Deliverable

One company partnership per semester.

#### Mission

Connect BSML and its members with companies.

#### Description

Source prospects on LinkedIn and via your network. Set up partnerships such as talks, hackathons,
projects, or interviews.

#### Approximate workflow
1. Research Milan companies and ML/AI/Data Science teams. Identify openings and profiles.
2. Contact key profiles, understand needs, and propose BSML value.
#### Examples
- An open Data Analyst role. Offer a candidate selection via
competition, hackathon, or interview.
- A data science team with real problems. Offer a pro-bono BSML
project.

#### Requirements
- Concise communication
- Understanding of company operations
- LinkedIn and business outreach fluency
- Interest in social engineering
**This role networks BSML with real companies.**

#### Deliverable

One event per semester.

#### Mission

Turn partnerships and projects into events.

#### Description

Design and run events: research talks, company sessions, showcases, dinners with guests, and more.

#### Approximate workflow
1. Track association projects and external opportunities.
2. Organize logistics: venue, date, schedule, and marketing.
#### Examples
- Convert a professor interview into a public research talk.
- Launch a company-hosted hackathon with an info session.
#### Requirements
- Organization and time management
- Attention to detail
**This role enables BSML to meet and thrive in person.**

#### Deliverable

One piece of content per month.

#### Mission

Boost credibility by publishing tangible outcomes.

#### Description

Work with associates to turn projects into compelling content: articles, videos, presentations, and
more.

#### Approximate workflow
1. Track projects and motivate publishing.
2. Shape the story: problem, approach, outcome.
3. Produce the content.
#### Examples
- Turn a thesis project into a clear article.
- Capture an event and publish a recap video.
#### Requirements
- Content skills (video, images, or writing)
- Excellent English
- Creativity and execution
**This role builds BSML’s credibility.**

#### Deliverable

One social post per week.

#### Mission

Share timely updates and insights about BSML.

#### Description

Find the most relevant association news and package it into posts for social and web.

#### Approximate workflow
1. Stay current on association activity.
2. Create and publish assets across channels.
#### Examples
- Announce an upcoming company event with flyers and details.

- Recap a hackathon with photos and outcomes.
#### Requirements
- Social media marketing interest
- Storytelling and communication
- Image-editing proficiency

metadata.heading_path: Our Founders

text:
## Divisions

Our teams

### Business Development

Build partnerships with funds, startups, and accelerators to secure projects and sponsorships. Networking events, webinars, competitions, etc.

### Media

Promote our events and grow our brand through our different social media channels and weekly newsletter. In charge of web development.

### Venture Capital

Complete projects with key industry players to get real-life VC exposure. Includes advising early-stage startups, supporting VCs in concrete projects.

### Articles

Write in-depth analysis on the state of VC, current trends and interesting developments.

metadata.title: BSVC
metadata.heading_path: Divisions

text:
### Maciej Wojciechowski

Vice President

Maciej Joined BSVC as a member of the events division. Earned his promotion to current position, after organising last year’s biggest event- pitch competition at Plug and Play’s office. Apart from his role in BSVC, Maciej also is a part of Innovis VC, where he holds the position of Partner Management Associate.

- ![](https://3o3w9mxsix.ufs.sh/f/CQVw9Uxo87NdegOHBCrMDB3ELfpls8Vm76ZQJjIeCaRTgrSy)

metadata.title: BSVC
metadata.heading_path: Meet the board > Maciej Wojciechowski

text:
### Ayush Jain

Co-Head Venture Capital

Ayush is a second-year BIEF student. He joined BSVC last year as a consulting associate. He was part of the Zero One Hundred Venture Academy and has experience working with startups (Consulting @ Magnet Capital and intern @ Startery). Ayush is familiar with the startup ecosystems of India and Europe.

- ![](https://3o3w9mxsix.ufs.sh/f/CQVw9Uxo87NdbObHzwgJQkMs1Yqe0XNRlimECf6aBKW5ZyHc)

metadata.title: Cappellania presso l’Università Bocconi di Milano – Rettoria San Ferdinando | Pastorale Giovanile – F.O.M. Fondazione Oratori Milanesi
metadata.heading_path: Cappellania presso l’Università Bocconi di Milano – Rettoria San Ferdinando | Pastorale Giovanile – F.O.M. Fondazione Oratori Milanesi

text:
Piazza Angelo Sraffa, 6 - Milano

[![Cappellania Universitaria Bocconi](https://www.chiesadimilano.it/pgfom/files/2019/06/Cappellania-Universitaria-Bocconi.jpg)](https://www.chiesadimilano.it/pgfom/universita/cappellania-presso-luniversita-bocconi-di-milano-rettoria-san-ferdinando-2840.html "Cappellania presso l'Università Bocconi di Milano - Rettoria San Ferdinando")

La **Rettoria S. Ferdinando**, voluta nel 1962 da Donna Javotte Bocconi Manca di Villahermosa, comprende la chiesa di San Ferdinando e alcuni ambienti destinati allo studio, alla formazione spirituale e allo sviluppo della coscienza cristiana degli studenti, dei docenti e del personale amministrativo dell’Università Bocconi. La chiesa è opera dell’architetto Ferdinando Reggiori. Venne costruita fra il 1961 ed il 1962 e consacrata dal Cardinale Giovanni Battista Montini, divenuto poi papa Paolo VI, il 30 maggio 1962.

La storia della Rettoria, la sua ubicazione in un quartiere sempre più popolato da studenti e la stretta vicinanza agli edifici universitari, che fa sì che si trovi come al centro di un campus, rendono molto particolare la configurazione di questa cappellania e l’attività che in essa viene svolta.

L’animazione della vita spirituale e culturale della Rettoria è affidata a un cappellano, incaricato per la Pastorale Universitaria in Università Bocconi, disponibile per il colloquio personale e l’accompagnamento spirituale. La Rettoria, inoltre, è punto di incontro per i gruppi, le associazioni, i movimenti ecclesiali che operano in università.

Nel sito della Rettoria si trovano le indicazioni degli appuntamenti futuri e i resoconti degli incontri fatti, più una serie di altre risorse, tutte da scoprire. Il continuo aggiornamento permette di mantenere il contatto tra i vicini e i lontani.

**Sede:** Piazza Angelo Sraffa, 6 – 20136 Milano

Tel. 02 58362295

E-mail: [donpierpaolo@unibocconi.it](mailto:donpierpaolo@unibocconi.it)

Sito: [www.sanferdinando.org](http://www.sanferdinando.org/)

**Rettore/cappellano:** don Pier Paolo Zannini – Cell. 347 4476080 – E-mail: [donpierpaolo@unibocconi.it](mailto:donpierpaolo@unibocconi.it)

**Proposte:**

– Celebrazione S. Messa feriale

– Celebrazione S. Messa domenicale

– Pellegrinaggio di inizio d’anno al Sacro Monte

– Ritiro spirituale nei tempi forti

– Coretto San Ferdinando

– Pranzo fraterno mensile

– Lectio divina il venerdì

– Gruppo di catechesi e preparazione al sacramento della Confermazione/Cresima

– Gruppo di lettura biblica

Previous

Next

Martedì 5 Maggio 2026

text:
Le Cappellanie e i Centri di Pastorale universitaria presenti e attivi sul territorio della Diocesi di Milano.

Le Cappellanie e i Centri di Pastorale universitaria si propongono come luoghi di incontro aperti a tutti e, in particolare, a coloro che nel tempo dell’università desiderano compiere un’esperienza spirituale; promuovono incontri culturali, spirituali e di condivisione fraterna.

**CAPPELLANIE UNIVERSITARIE:**

[Cappellania presso l’Università degli Studi di Milano Statale](https://www.chiesadimilano.it/pgfom/universita/cappellania-presso-luniversita-degli-studi-di-milano-statale-2847.html)

[Cappellania presso l’Università Bocconi di Milano – Rettoria San Ferdinando](https://www.chiesadimilano.it/pgfom/universita/cappellania-presso-luniversita-bocconi-di-milano-rettoria-san-ferdinando-2840.html)

## Let Our Team Take Your Business to Higher Grounds

With a community of diverse student consultants, we deliver real and measurable impact. Our client-focus, unique perspective and motivation allow us to be innovative in our approach.

​

We believe that together, we can help businesses reach their full potential.

### Product-Market Fit

Market validation that ensures our client of sustainable demand.

### Market Analysis

Evaluation of the attractiveness and the dynamics of a certain market within a special industry.

### Growth Strategy

Inbound sales or entry market strategies to evaluate scalability and expansion methods.

### Funding Diagnostics

Evaluation of investor pitch decks and viable funding methods to increase valuation.

text:
## Niente "clickbait", solo verifiche e coraggio.

Preferiamo controllare una cosa in più, aspettare quando serve, farci una domanda scomoda invece di cercare una scorciatoia.

Con due caffè al mese ci aiuti a offrire un punto di riferimento solido, anche quando tutto intorno spinge nella direzione opposta.

Forse dopo

Martedì, 5 Maggio 2026

[![meteo](https://citynews.stgy.ovh/~shared/images/meteo/3bmeteo/54.png)Coperto con rovesci di pioggia](https://www.milanotoday.it/meteo/ "Il meteo a Milano: Rovesci di pioggia")

[CityNews](https://www.citynews.it/)

[Abbonati \\
Aggiorna piano](https://www.milanotoday.it/signup/premium-products/?source=header)

[Accedi](https://www.milanotoday.it/user/login/)

### VIDEO DEL GIORNO

[Le uova di falco pellegrino in cima al Pirellone si schiudono nel giorno di Pasqua](https://www.milanotoday.it/video/falchetti-pirellone-nati-a-pasqua.html)


Redazione30 giugno 2020 08:00

[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.milanotoday.it%2Fguida%2Fgiovani%2Fmusei-sconti-studenti.html) [WhatsApp](https://wa.me/?text=I+musei+di+Milano+con+sconti+per+studenti+%40+https%3A%2F%2Fwww.milanotoday.it%2Fguida%2Fgiovani%2Fmusei-sconti-studenti.html)

Condividi

Gam Milano (da Wikipedia)

"La cultura è un bene comune primario come l’acqua; i teatri, le [biblioteche](https://www.milanotoday.it/guida/giovani/biblioteche-aperte-milano-studiare-lavorare-orari.html), i cinema sono come tanti acquedotti". Lo diceva il direttore d'orchestra italiano, Claudio Abbado. E proprio perché, come indicano le sue parole, **la cultura è un bene comune primario**, questa dovrebbe essere accessibile a tutti. A fare da contrappeso a mostre e spettacoli teatrali dai costi proibitivi, per fortuna, ci sono molti musei che oltre ad aprire gratuitamente ogni prima domenica del mese, offrono agli studenti tariffe speciali. Ecco quali sono i **musei di Milano con sconti per studenti**.

metadata.title: I musei di Milano con sconti per studenti
metadata.heading_path: Niente "clickbait", solo verifiche e coraggio.

text:
## Strutture con prezzi scontati per giovani e studenti

**Acquario e Civica Stazione Idrobiologica Milano**

Viale Gadio, 2 - Milano. Qui pagano 3 euro, invece di 5, i giovani tra i 18 e i 25 anni e gli studenti universitari.

**Armani Silos**

Via Bergognone, 40 - Milano. Prenotazione: Nessuna. Qui i ragazzi fino a 26 anni entrano a 8,40 euro e gli studenti 6 euro.

**Castello Sforzesco**

Piazzale Castello - Milano. Prenotazione: Nessuna. Gli studenti delle superiori accedono gratuitamente, mentre gli universitari pagano 3 euro invece di 5.

**Cenacolo Vinciano**

Piazza Santa Maria delle Grazie, 2 - Milano. Prenotazione: Obbligatoria. Questo museo è gratis per ragazzi fino a 18 anni. Entrano a prezzo ridotto quelli fino a 25 anni.

**Casa museo Boschi Di Stefano**

Via Giorgio Jan, 15 - Milano. Prenotazione: Nessuna. Gratis per tutti.

**Galleria d'arte moderna di Milano**

Via Palestro, 16 - Milano. Prenotazione: Nessuna. Fino a 18 anni i ragazzi entrano gratis, così come gli studenti delle superiori; gli universitari pagano 3 euro invece di 5.

**Museo Studio Francesco Messina**

Via S. Sisto, 4/a - Milano. Prenotazione: Nessuna. Gratis per tutti.

**Museo archeologico di Milano**

Corso Magenta, 15 - Milano. Prenotazione: Nessuna. Questo museo è gratis per i minorenni e costa 3 euro invece di 5 per gli studenti universitari.

**Museo civico di storia naturale di Milano**

Corso Venezia, 55 - Milano. Prenotazione: Nessuna. A costo zero sotto i 18 anni e a 3 invece di 5 euro per studenti universitari.

**Museo del Novecento di Milano**

Via Marconi, 1 - Milano. Prenotazione: Nessuna. Gratis fino ai 12 anni, a 5 euro fino ai 18 anni e 8 euro, invece di 10, per universitari.

**Museo del Risorgimento**

Via Borgonuovo, 23 - Milano. Prenotazione: Nessuna. Gratis per tutti.

**Museo diocesano di Milano**

Corso di Porta Ticinese, 95 - Milano. Prenotazione: Nessuna. Gratis per studenti delle Facoltà di Beni Culturali, Architettura e Design, Accademia di Belle Arti. Ridotto a 8 euro invece di 10 per dai 6 ai 18 anni e per studenti universitari muniti di tesserino.

**Palazzo Morando- Costume, moda, immagine**

Via Sant'Andrea, 6 - Milano. Prenotazione: Nessuna. Gratis per tutti.

**Pinacoteca di Brera**

metadata.title: I musei di Milano con sconti per studenti
metadata.heading_path: Strutture con prezzi scontati per giovani e studenti

text:
Via Brera, 28 - Milano. Prenotazione: Nessuna. Gratis per studenti delle Facoltà di Architettura, Conservazione dei Beni Culturali, Scienze della Formazione, Lettere e Filosofia con indirizzo archeologico o storico-artistico, Accademie di Belle Arti. Ingresso a 2 euro per ragazzi dai 18 ai 25 anni.

**Palazzo Reale**

Piazza del Duomo, 12. Ridotto a 12 euro, invece di 14, per giovani fino ai 26 anni.

**Fondazione Prada**

Largo Isarco. Gli studenti universitari fino ai 26 anni entrano con ridotto a 12 euro invece di 15 per temporanee e ridotto a 8 euro invece di 10 euro per la permanente. Ingresso gratuito fino ai 18 anni.

## Executive Programs

The SEKC offers **several programs** in the fields of Sport and Entertainment, both in traditional classroom and online (synchronous or asynchronous), at Master and Executive level, as well as the possibility to build a path tailored to the needs of organizations (custom programs).

The SEKC has also developed several partnerships and key initiatives with relevant players in the international market.

text:
## Research & Dissemination

The SEKC produces and disseminates knowledge through its team of **academics and professionals**, covering different areas of expertise, which allows a **comprehensive** and **in-depth** perspective of the ecosystems and their actors. The SEKC also organizes and supports initiatives for the diffusion and development of knowledge.

[Discover more](https://www.sdabocconi.it/en/faculty-research/research/sport-and-entertainment-knowledge-center/output/)

metadata.title: Sport and Entertainment Knowledge Center - Activities | SDA Bocconi
metadata.heading_path: Research & Dissemination

text:
## Networking

The SEKC knowledge network has grown over the years through experiences and relationships with **market leaders** and **key players**. As a consequence, the SEKC boasts a **global, wide** and **high profile** network of organizations and brands.

**Knowledge Generation Network**

The know-how of the sports and entertainment ecosystems in SDA Bocconi is a natural consequence of the in-depth knowledge developed over the years through experiences and relationships with leaders of the industries.

- Sport organizations (Federations, Leagues, Clubs)
- Sport event organizers
- Consulting firms
- Venues
- Marketing and media companies
- Event agencies
- Entertainment companies
- Data and tech companies
- Universities and institutions

**Alumni Network**

Bocconi University has over 130,000 alumni, with 21,100 alumni coming from SDA Bocconi.

This dynamic network of people based in more than 110 countries is an invaluable asset. Through the alumni network, you can access a wealth of experience and knowledge, and build strong and lasting relationships.

Bocconi Alumni Community - is constantly growing and includes graduates, managers, faculty and executives from a large number of organizations and institutions.

FIFA Master Alumni established an association, the [FIFA Master Alumni Worldwide](https://www.fifama.org/), which promotes many different initiatives to develop and share knowledge.

**Universities Collaborations**

The Sports & Entertainment Knowledge Centre of SDA Bocconi School of Management collaborates with various universities and events to explore international managerial challenges in sports. In particular, it collaborates with Columbia University, where it takes part in presentations and discussions comparing American and international sports models. The Master's in Sport Management at Columbia University ranks among the most prestigious worldwide, placing 7th in the Sport Business Postgraduate Rankings 2022.

Additionally, the Centre collaborates with the Middle East Sports Investment Forum 2024 (MESIF) to publish a joint White Paper examining different aspects of sports and investment in the Middle East. MESIF 2024 brings key sports stakeholders from across the region to London to share their vision for sports development. The report will highlight key insights from panel discussions at MESIF 2024, taking place at the Emirates Stadium on June 5.

**Event Collaborations**

The Sports & Entertainment Knowledge Centre of SDA Bocconi School of Management teamed up with the [Middle East Sports Investment Forum 2024 (MESIF)](https://www.mesif2024.com/) to publish a joint White Paper focusing on the various facets of sports and investment in the Middle East.

MESIF2024 is the event that brings key sports stakeholders from across the Middle East to London to share their vision for regional sports development. The report will elaborate on key lessons from panel discussions at MESIF 2024, taking place at the Emirates Stadium on 5 June.

Contacts

metadata.title: Sport and Entertainment Knowledge Center - Output | SDA Bocconi
metadata.heading_path: News > SDA Bocconi Insight

text:
The Sport and Entertainment Knowledge Center has a dedicated faculty able to carry out research, innovation and education with an international profile.

The team includes academics and professionals who have worked in the sports and entertainment worlds for several years, covering different areas of expertise, allowing for a comprehensive and in-depth perspective of the two ecosystems and their actors.

The **Sports & Entertainment Ecosystem** coordinates initiatives related to the world of **sports, entertainment, and events**, developing long-term relationships with main actors at international level.

metadata.title: Sport and Entertainment Knowledge Center | SDA Bocconi
metadata.heading_path: Sport and Entertainment Knowledge Center | SDA Bocconi

text:
## Mission

The Sport and Entertainment Knowledge Center aims to support **strategic decision makers** through data analysis and managerial innovation. Knowledge is generated by combining different economic-managerial competencies and constantly engaging in new debates to analyse, compare and propose new social, cultural and economic models, creating bridges among industries.

The sports, entertainment and events systems have economic implications, but they also have social and cultural implications through their main assets: **athletes, artists, events, fans, clubs, leagues, event organizers, entertainment and media companies and events facilities**.

metadata.title: Sport and Entertainment Knowledge Center | SDA Bocconi
metadata.heading_path: Knowledge Practices

text:
## Our target partners

Being the dedicated unit at SDA Bocconi that coordinates training, research and dissemination, networking initiatives about Sports and Entertainment, the SEKC proposes itself as Educational Arm to add value to specific institutions and organizations.

The most important step towards creating the partnership is to identify a shared vision and common goals to be reached together.

Ideally, the entities whom the SEKC would partner with aim at:

- Innovating the economic, managerial and social dynamics that drive the international sports and entertainment systems
- Developing knowledge for future transformation in sports and entertainment industries
- Having an independent and privileged point of view at the international level

metadata.title: Sport and Entertainment Knowledge Center | SDA Bocconi
metadata.heading_path: Our target partners

text:
## Output

The SEKC produces and disseminates knowledge through its team of **academics** and **professionals**, covering different areas of expertise, which allows a **comprehensive** and **in-depth** perspective of the ecosystems and their actors. The SEKC also organizes and supports initiatives for the diffusion and development of knowledge.

[Discover more](https://www.sdabocconi.it/en/faculty-research/research/sport-and-entertainment-knowledge-center/output/)

metadata.title: Sport and Entertainment Knowledge Center | SDA Bocconi
metadata.heading_path: Output

text:
## People

The Sport and Entertainment Knowledge Center has a dedicated faculty able to carry out research, innovation and education with an international profile.

The team includes academics and professionals who have worked in the sports and entertainment worlds for several years, covering different areas of expertise, allowing for a comprehensive and in-depth perspective of the two ecosystems and their actors.

[Discover more](https://www.sdabocconi.it/en/faculty-research/research/sport-and-entertainment-knowledge-center/people/)

metadata.heading_path: Sport marketing & sponsorship | Competenze per un manager sportivo di successo | SDA Bocconi

text:
## Revenue generation in the sports industry

Arts, sports and events

The program develops the skills needed to manage marketing and sponsorship activities, as well as to design and organize events in the sports sector. Through the analysis of best practices, discussions with industry experts, and practical application of acquired knowledge, participants will explore reference models, operational tools, and new insights to manage the business in an innovative way.

metadata.title: Sport marketing & sponsorship | Competenze per un manager sportivo di successo | SDA Bocconi
metadata.heading_path: Revenue generation in the sports industry

text:
## Structure and contents

The “Sports Marketing & Sponsorship” Online Program can be attended whenever and however you wish. However, to maximize learning, we recommend spreading the learning commitment over 8 weeks with an average allocation of approximately 3 hours per week.

1st week

### Fundamentals of sports marketing

2nd week

### The sports marketing plan

3rd week

### Revenue generation in the sports industry

4th week

### Branding in the sports industry

5th week

### The sports product

6th week

### Sponsorship

7th week

### Digital transformation in the sports industry

8th week

### The voice of the testimonials

text:
## Grazie per il vostro sostegno!

Dieci anni fa, un gruppo di giovani ha fondato Tortuga con un’idea semplice ma ambiziosa: portare nel dibattito pubblico **analisi indipendenti, rigorose e accessibili** a tutti per **migliorare le politiche pubbliche in Italia**. Oggi, dopo un decennio di impegno, continuiamo a prestare il nostro lavoro volontario con la stessa passione dei primi giorni.

Lo facciamo specialmente grazie al sostegno di tutti quanti hanno **donato a Tortuga** durante la nostra campagna di fundraising 2025: **grazie a voi, un’Italia più equa, inclusiva e innovativa** si è avvicinata almeno un poco.

#### Cosa facciamo?

##### Analisi e report

Scriviamo analisi e report per approfondire i problemi del Paese con uno stile indipendente e rigoroso ma accessibile a tutti.

[Leggi i nostri articoli](https://www.tortuga-econ.it/analisi/)

##### Proposte

Elaboriamo proposte di politiche pubbliche moderne e efficaci

[Sfoglia i nostri report](https://www.tortuga-econ.it/report/)

##### Servizi

Forniamo supporto professionale a istituzioni pubbliche, imprese e enti privati o a singoli policymaker.

[Esplora le nostre collaborazioni](https://www.tortuga-econ.it/dicono-di-noi/)

text:
## Dicono di noi

> Tortuga sta collaborando col nostro Osservatorio con motivazione, puntualità ed integrità. Speriamo insieme di portare maggiore attenzione sui temi politici di lungo periodo, come la sostenibilità dei conti pubblici e l’equità inter-generazionale.
>
> “
>
> Carlo CottarelliEconomista - Già Direttore Osservatorio sui Conti Pubblici Italiani

> Il gruppo Tortuga unisce all’attenzione per il dato statistico il coraggio di andare controcorrente. Sono entrambe virtù rare in questo Paese. Ed è incoraggiante che dei giovani economisti si occupino di problemi di grande rilevanza con tanta passione.
>
> “
>
> Tito BoeriEconomista - Già Presidente INPS

> Tortuga è un think tank di giovani economisti che lavorano con energia e professionalità, i loro report sono accurati e pieni di spunti interessanti.
>
> “
>
> Irene TinagliPresidente Comm. Affari Economici del Parlamento UE

> Il libro _**Ci Pensiamo Noi**_ sarebbe in grado di reggere a qualunque tipo di fact-checking.
>
> Mi è piaciuto il rigore, anomalo rispetto a un dibattito pubblico italiano in cui politici e non sparano numeri a casaccio. Tortuga propone proposte discutibili ma fattibili.
>
> “
>
> Antonio MisianiParlamentare - Già Viceministro all’Economia

> _**Ci Pensiamo Noi**_ non è un libro di lamentele, non è un libro di richieste, ma di analisi e di proposte. E trovo che questo sia molto utile. Per ogni problema ci sono proposte concrete e fattibili, che possono essere messe subito in pratica.
>
> “
>
> Myrta MerlinoGiornalista

> Tortuga è una associazione che è fucina di idee e di talenti. Senza una nuova classe di appassionati il cambiamento potrebbe non arrivare mai.
>
> “
>
> Alessandro TommasiCEO di NOS e fondatore di Will\_media

> I contributi di Tortuga sono uno stimolo prezioso per chi si occupa della cosa pubblica e affronta temi legati all’attrattività e alla competitività del nostro Paese. La politica sarebbe migliore e più attenta ai problemi dei giovani se si affidasse di più a studi come i loro.
>
> “
>
> Giulia PastorellaDeputata della Repubblica Italiana

> Per la trasmissione Zapping che conduco ogni giorno su Rai Radio1 sono sempre in cerca di idee nuove e originali, meglio ancora se portate da giovani capaci e appassionati. E’ una lotta inesausta contro il trombonismo nazionale, contro le idee ricevute, i principi di autorità. In tutto questo Tortuga è una fonte inesauribile e un alleato su cui contare.
>
> “
>
> Giancarlo LoquenziGiornalista - Zapping (Radio 1)

metadata.title: Think-tank Tortuga
metadata.heading_path: Dicono di noi

text:
> Un gruppo di giovani economisti competenti nell'analisi dei fenomeni economici attuali, dei dati e del policy-making che contribuisce a comprendere e migliorare il nostro paese - Tortuga è studio, approfondimento, spirito critico e energia di nuova generazione.
>
> “
>
> Paola ProfetaEconomista - Pro-rettrice Università Bocconi

> Tortuga porta un contributo prezioso al dibattito pubblico con le sue analisi precise e documentate e mai di parte. Inoltre, negli anni si è affermata come un’efficace palestra di formazione per chi ne fa parte, insegnando a legare quanto si studia in università con i grandi temi del dibattito pubblico. Anche se forse il termine è passato di moda, Tortuga è una preziosa e rara fucina di classe dirigente.
>
> “
>
> Andrea GarneroEconomista OCSE

> Tortuga è un esperimento unico di cooperazione a fini scientifici che mette davanti l'interesse pubblico alla divulgazione piuttosto che la visibilità privata. Un esempio che ci danno i giovani.
>
> “
>
> Marco LeonardiEconomista

> Dal giugno 2015 lavoce riceve le gradite incursioni del team Tortuga. Incursioni piratesche ricorrenti ma non periodiche, come le fluttuazioni del ciclo economico. Mai scontate nei contenuti e sempre di piacevole lettura.
>
> “
>
> Francesco DaveriEconomista Bocconi - Lavoce.info

> Il problema cronico della politica italiana è la gestione emergenziale, per questo motivo lo spazio per politiche originali e divergenti diventa raro. È in questi momenti che un confronto con Tortuga diventa importante.
>
> “
>
> Niccolò InvidiaEx Deputato della Repubblica Italiana

> È stato gratificante lavorare con i giovani di Tortuga su iniziative a sostegno di altri giovani più vulnerabili. È la riconferma che dobbiamo imparare a far tesoro delle energie delle nuove generazioni, delle loro competenze e sensibilità. Soprattutto ora, per ripartire.
>
> “
>
> Emanuela RossiniEx Deputata della Repubblica Italiana

text:
About Us

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us)

Diversity, Equity and Inclusion

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion)


Bocconi University iscommitted to pursuing its main research and training objectives in an environment (both physical and intellectual) in which **everyone receives and offers to others equal opportunities, dignity and treatment.** This is why it is investing increasing resources so that all talented and deserving students can enroll in and attend its programs.

Customized support and services are available to students with temporary or permanent disabilities, while other forms of support and services are available to students with specific learning disorders (SLDs). These aim to ensure all students can participate in academic activities and be fully integrated into university life.

[Dedicated services available for current students](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/services-students-disabilities-mockup "Services for Students with Disabilities mockup") include personalized measures for lectures and exams; accessible accommodation; and digitized materials. They may also receive personalized assistance regarding exchange programs and career guidance.

metadata.title: Services for Prospective Students with Disabilities, Learning Disorders and Other Specific Needs | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Services for Prospective Students with Disabilities, Learning Disorders and Other Specific Needs | Bocconi University

text:
## Your Application Journey

Admissions

Support measures may be provided during the admissions test to meet the needs of students with disabilities and learning disorders. These include adaption of the work station during the online test, additional time and other aids.

Complete information is available online on the pages dedicated to the [Bocconi admissions test](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/application-and-admissions/disabilities-and-learning-disorders "Disabilities and learning disorders").

Financial Aid

Bocconi University provides **a 100% tuition and fees waiver** for students with disabilities recognized in accordance with Italian Law no. 104/1992 or with a disability equal to or greater than 66%. It is available to students enrolled in the first year or in a year after the first with a certificate of disability or certificate of civil disability, issued by an Italian Medical Committee.

Complete information and specifics are published online for students enrolled in [Bachelor and Law programs](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/funding/tuition-waiver-students-disabilities-equal-or-greater-66-ay-2026-27 "Tuition waiver for students with disabilities equal or greater than 66% - A.Y. 2026-27") or [Master of Science and MA programs](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/master-science-and-ma-programs/funding/tuition-waiver-students-disabilities-equal-or-greater-66-master-science-programs "Tuition waiver for students with disabilities equal or greater than 66% - Master of Science programs a.y. 2026-27").

On-Campus Housing

52 rooms in Bocconi Residence Halls are designed to [accommodate students with disabilities](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/housing/life-bocconi-dorms "On campus dorms and disabilities"). In addition, students with disabilities equal to or greater than 66% are given priority over other students for housing assignments.

About Us

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us)

Diversity, Equity and Inclusion

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion)


The **Inclusion Service** is a point of reference that aims to guarantee the same opportunities to everyone: it collaborates with other offices on campus to create a connected and unified community where everyone – students, faculty, staff and alumni – can feel welcome and included.

**Contact Us**

The Inclusion Service is the first point of contact for the Bocconi community regarding issues such as:

- Physical and digital accessibility
- Support for students with disabilities and other specific needs
- Multiculturalism
- Gender
- Inclusion and non-discrimination

Email: [**inclusion@unibocconi.it**](mailto:inclusion@unibocconi.it)

**Bocconi Students**

Students can contact the Inclusion Service on **B in Touch: Inclusion, Disability and Wellbeing** section, or in person at the **B in Touch Point** at the address **Piazza Sraffa 11**.

text:
About Us

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us)

Diversity, Equity and Inclusion

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion)


Every day Bocconi endeavors to build a university that is truly reflective of the society in which we want to live. It continues to be an increasingly diverse and inclusive institution — a physical and virtual space that is both safe and welcoming for all.

Ensuring that members of its community — regardless of gender, gender identity, religion, nationality, ethnicity, socioeconomic background, sexual orientation, disability or mental health needs — feel both seen and heard remains a crucial objective of the University.

metadata.title: Equal Opportunities and Belonging | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Equal Opportunities and Belonging | Bocconi University

text:
### Gender Diversity

The University is committed to fostering a welcoming and inclusive environment for everyone, regardless of gender, gender identity and sexual orientation.

Additionally, Bocconi recognizes the importance of gender equality as a core value for an equitable and respectful academic community by tracking gender representation within the University and taking actions to raise awareness and achieve parity.

The Inclusive Gender Equality Plan (IGEP) 2025–2027 is a three-year strategy that reflects on the present while outlining future initiatives to promote equal opportunities at the University and in academia.

[Find Out More](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion/governance-people-and-policies/inclusive-gender-equality-plan-and-gender-report)

The Gender Report analyzes gender equality trends over time using various indicators, while also outlining activities aimed at promoting gender equality, equal opportunities, and the wellbeing of all university members.

[Find Out More](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion/governance-people-and-policies/inclusive-gender-equality-plan-and-gender-report)

This document outlines Bocconi University’s commitment to gender equality, defining principles and objectives for an inclusive, fair and respectful environment, in line with the Strategic Plan 2026–2030.

[Read More](https://www.unibocconi.it/sites/default/files/media/attachments/852%20Gender%20Equality%20Policy%20eng.pdf?VersionId=sh9qfSVuWoiL5Re71Y8evc0BuZ_pD7H4)

The Alias identity is an alternative and temporary bureaucratic profile that replaces the registry name of a person going through a gender reassignment process with a chosen name.

[Find Out More](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/organization/statute-regulations-and-rules/rules/regulations-activation-and-management-alias-identities)

To ensure comfort for non-binary, transgender and all individuals, Bocconi has established [all gender restrooms](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/campus/buildings-and-classrooms) in every building alongside restrooms already available at the University.

metadata.title: Equal Opportunities and Belonging | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Equal Opportunities and Belonging | Bocconi University > Gender Diversity

text:
### Gender Equality Certification

Bocconi has obtained the Certification for Gender Equality according to UNI/PdR 125:2022. The certification is based on the principles of transparency, measurability and responsibility. It has been implemented through a Management System that includes objectives, indicators and periodic monitoring, inspired and supported by the principles of the Gender Equality Policy.

This milestone reflects adopted policies and practices, and confirms our University’s role as a center for the production of knowledge on gender equality issues, with the aim of actively contributing to change in society and the economic system.

[Download the Certification](https://www.unibocconi.it/sites/default/files/media/attachments/UNI_PdR%20125_2022%20-%20Certificate%20IPDR-0326-13.pdf?VersionId=sd9I_YA7WWGT0Czqo2vhaUVvo6ASCgkD)

metadata.title: Equal Opportunities and Belonging | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Equal Opportunities and Belonging | Bocconi University > Gender Equality Certification

text:
### Multiculturalism

The university campus is located in Milan, an international and innovative metropolis — a place where languages, experiences, ideas and interests are exchanged on a daily basis, fostering both professional and personal growth.

Bocconi embraces cultural diversity by fostering an inclusive environment where individuals from different backgrounds feel valued through ongoing dialogue that acknowledges and responds to their unique experiences and needs.

**Multicultural Classes:** Multicultural classes are a key resource for students since they encourage the exchange of experiences and ideas, and present an important source of inspiration for faculty. However, they are also incredibly complex to navigate. This is why “Diversity and Inclusion in Teaching” was created — a training course created for faculty that, among other topics, addresses the management of multicultural classes, providing practical solutions for situations that might occur in the classroom.

[**Bocconi Alumni Community**](https://www.bocconialumni.it/): The Bocconi Alumni Community allows its over 146,000 members (graduates of Bachelor, Master, Specialized Master and PhD programs, as well as SDA program graduates, who live and work in various countries) — located in numerous chapters around the world — to keep in touch and stay engaged with Bocconi. The Community organizes events and themed seminars, and also offers Career Advice services.

**Multifaith Space:** A multifaith space is located on campus, open to the entire student body, faculty and staff. It was designed to permit anyone to practice their faith, pray or simply devote a moment to reflection and silence.

**Ethical-Religious Meals:** The offering of halal, kosher and vegan meals in dining areas underscores Bocconi's commitment to recognizing and supporting the dietary needs of the entire community — which may be related to religious, ethical and/or cultural beliefs.

[**Student Associations**](https://www.unibocconi.it/it/studenti-iscritti/campus-life/attivita-studentesche/elenco-delle-associazioni "Elenco delle associazioni") **:** As of today, there are more than 100 student associations on campus, including ones representing various international communities. The associations offer an opportunity to engage with people from different backgrounds who share common interests, thus becoming a point of reference and mutual support.

metadata.title: Equal Opportunities and Belonging | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Equal Opportunities and Belonging | Bocconi University > Multiculturalism

text:
### Disabilities and Specific Learning Disorders (SLDs)

The University provides support and access for people with disabilities and/or specific learning disorders in its **community**, making efforts to guarantee equal opportunities through accessible infrastructure, assistive technologies, and other specialized services.

Students can receive support during their **university career**, including: personalized measures for the admission test, lectures and exams; accessible accommodation; and digitized materials. Additionally, they can receive personalized assistance regarding exchange programs and career guidance.

The objective is to encourage a participatory experience, fostering the full realization of each individual’s potential.

Dedicated services are available for both [prospective students](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion/equal-opportunities-and-belonging/services-prospective-students-disabilities-learning-disorders-and-other-specific-0 "Services for Prospective Students with Disabilities, Learning Disorders and Other Specific Needs") and [current students](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/inclusion-disabilities-and-learning-disorders/services-students-disabilities-slds-adhd-and-other-specific-needs "Services for Students with Disabilities, SLDs, ADHD and Other Specific Needs").

metadata.title: Equal Opportunities and Belonging | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Equal Opportunities and Belonging | Bocconi University > Disabilities and Specific Learning Disorders (SLDs)

text:
### Accessibility

#### **Physical Accessibility and Dedicated Services**

Accessibility of campus spaces is guaranteed for all students, faculty, staff and visitors. The University has installed elevator platforms, wheelchair ramps, and automated doors, and has also constructed accessible classrooms with built-in or additional desks.

For people with blindness or low vision, the following services can be found on campus: radio beacons (signal transmitters placed outside buildings and along connecting paths); Braille maps of the campus; and Braille plaques outside classrooms, offices and bathrooms. Other services available to all members of the community include:

- [access for service animals](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion/equal-opportunities-and-belonging/campus-access-service-animals "On-Campus Access of Service Animals")
- [home-university transportation](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion/equal-opportunities-and-belonging/home-university-transfer-people-motor-disabilities "Home-University Transfer for People with Motor Disabilities")
- a [mobility companion service](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion/equal-opportunities-and-belonging/mobility-companion-service-people-disabilities "Mobility Companion Service for People with Disabilities") between buildings
- public and private parking spaces for people with disabilities

#### Digital Accessibility

Bocconi promotes a just, inclusive and accessible digital environment for its entire community by voluntarily adhering to current digital accessibility standards, including Law 4/2004 and AgID guidelines for accessibility of IT tools. The University works hard to continuously modernize and improve its digital content, as demonstrated by the [accessibility statement](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion/accessibility-statement "Accessibility Statement"). In order to stay informed of new technologies and standards in digital accessibility, Bocconi has partnered with a digital accessibility expert.

metadata.title: Equal Opportunities and Belonging | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Equal Opportunities and Belonging | Bocconi University > Accessibility

text:
### Health and Wellbeing

The physical and mental wellbeing of members of the Bocconi community (students, faculty and staff) is a priority for the University. The University promotes a healthy lifestyle, offering specific resources dedicated to balancing both physical and mental health through one's professional and academic path.

Available initiatives include:

- [wellbeing activities](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/campus-life/counseling-self-empowerment-and-wellbeing/wellbeing "Wellbeing")
- [counseling service](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/campus-life/counseling-self-empowerment-and-wellbeing/counseling "Counseling")
- [on-campus safety and security](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/campus/campus-safety-and-security "On-Campus Safety and Security")
- counseling helpdesk for core faculty and staff (ISSIM)

[More…](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion/equal-opportunities-and-belonging#addtoany "Show all")

metadata.title: Equal Opportunities and Belonging | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Equal Opportunities and Belonging | Bocconi University > Health and Wellbeing

text:
## Students with Disabilities

Financial Aid

For students enrolled in [Bachelor and Law programs](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/funding/tuition-waiver-students-disabilities-equal-or-greater-66-ay-2026-27 "Tuition waiver for students with disabilities equal or greater than 66% - A.Y. 2026-27") or [Master of Science and MA programs](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/master-science-and-ma-programs/funding/tuition-waiver-students-disabilities-equal-or-greater-66-master-science-programs "Tuition waiver for students with disabilities equal or greater than 66% - Master of Science programs a.y. 2026-27"), a full tuition waiver is provided in case of 66% disability recognized throughout Italy or greater.

Housing

The University has provided accommodations in each [residence hall](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing/life-bocconi-dorms-ay-2026-27 "Life in the Bocconi dorms a.y. 2026-27") designed to assist students with disabilities. Those with 66% disability or greater have priority in the allocation of housing over other students.

Teaching and Exams

The University provides technologies that support classroom learning and individual study, including [Sensus Access](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/campus/services/sensus-access "Sensus Access") (for converting documents into accessible alternative formats) and the Blackboard Ally plug-in, in addition to textbooks in digital format.

Regarding exams, compensatory and dispensatory measures are assigned according to medical documentation, which may include extra time or the use of calculators or a computer.

For more information, see the _Compensatory/Dispensatory Measures During Exams: Initial Request, Types and Deadlines_ paragraph of the [Guides to the University](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/guide-university "Guide all'Università") _._

Library Services

The Library offers [dedicated services](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/library-archives/about-us/accessibility-and-inclusion "Accessibility and Inclusion") to guarantee access to information and to provide accessible spaces, as well as reserved priority seating. In addition, it is an institution authorized by the Italian Ministry of Culture to produce accessible digital copies of works protected by copyright for people with neurological, visual or motor disabilities.

Mobility Companion Service

A special [mobility companion service](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion/equal-opportunities-and-belonging/mobility-companion-service-people-disabilities "Mobility Companion Service for People with Disabilities") is available to help people with disabilities move around campus.

Home-University Transportation

A [transfer service](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion/equal-opportunities-and-belonging/home-university-transfer-people-motor-disabilities "Home-University Transfer for People with Motor Disabilities") provides home-university transport for students, staff and faculty with motor disabilities.

Service Animals

Properly trained [service animals](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion/equal-opportunities-and-belonging/campus-access-service-animals "On-Campus Access of Service Animals") can accompany people with motor disabilities, sensory disabilities, psychiatric disorders or serious illnesses on campus.

International Exchange Programs

metadata.title: Services for Students with Disabilities, SLDs, ADHD and Other Specific Needs - Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Students with Disabilities

text:
The Study Abroad office examines the specific needs of every student with disabilities who may be interested in participating in an [exchange program](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/international-mobility "International Mobility"), collaborating with partner universities to identify the available services in terms of accessibility and support.

Entering the Workforce

The [Disabilities and Work (DAL) Service](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/career-services/career-guidance-approaching-job-market/career-guidance "Career Guidance") supports people with disabilities when looking for internship and job opportunities. The Service organizes one-on-one counseling meetings, monitors application processes, and is the point of contact for employers seeking candidates in this category.

For more information, please visit the FAQ section on yoU@B > B in Touch > 'Inclusion, Disability and Wellbeing', where you can submit your inquiry.

You may also contact the [Inclusion Service](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/diversity-equity-and-inclusion/governance-people-and-policies/inclusion-service "Inclusion Service") office to request an interview and learn more about the available services.

text:
## Students with SLDs, ADHD and Other Specific Needs

Teaching and Exams

The University provides technologies that support classroom learning and individual study, including [Sensus Access](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/campus/services/sensus-access "Sensus Access") (for converting documents into accessible alternative formats) and the Blackboard Ally plug-in, in addition to textbooks in digital format.

Regarding exams, compensatory and dispensatory measures are assigned according to medical documentation, which may include extra time or the use of calculators or a computer.

For more information, see the _Compensatory/Dispensatory Measures During Exams: Initial Request, Types and Deadlines_ paragraph of the [Guides to the University](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/guide-university "Guide all'Università") _._

Library Services

The Bocconi Library is an institution authorized by the Italian Ministry of Culture to [produce accessible copies](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/library-archives/about-us/accessibility-and-inclusion) of works protected by copyright for people with SLDs.

Learning Needs Help Desk

The [Desk](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/campus-life/learning-needs "Learning Needs") was established to provide every student with an SLD the chance to receive individual counseling on the best study strategies to tackle the university experience.

Peer to Peer Tutoring Project

This [service](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/campus-life/peer-peer-tutoring-project "Peer to Peer Tutoring Project") aims to improve and optimize study abilities through peer support, provided by student volunteers who have received specific training.

You may contact the Academic Specific Needs office via B in Touch > Exams > Disability and Specific Needs.

[More…](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/inclusion-disabilities-and-learning-disorders/services-students-disabilities-slds-adhd-and-other-specific-needs#addtoany "Show all")
